unlocks.name: The Ember Oracle
unlocks.desc: Complete 5 total runs

data.title: The Ember Oracle
data.text: A swirling pillar of flame speaks in riddles. It sees all possible futures.

choices.label: Peer Into Tomorrow
choices.desc: See all enemy types in next 3 encounters

choices.label: Burn the Past
choices.desc: Remove 3 weakest cards, gain +10 Embers

choices.label: Embrace the Flame
choices.desc: +0.4× universal mult, lose 20% max HP

unlocks.name: The Void Merchant
unlocks.desc: Deal 2000 total damage across all runs

data.title: The Void Merchant
data.text: A figure made of shadow and starlight. 'I trade in potential.'

choices.label: Trade a Relic
choices.desc: Sacrifice a relic for 2 Flame modifiers

choices.label: Trade Your Hand
choices.desc: Discard hand, draw all new rare cards

choices.label: Trade HP
choices.desc: Set HP to 1. All cards get +5 chips permanently

unlocks.name: The Chronos Dealer
unlocks.desc: Win 10 total runs

data.title: The Chronos Dealer
data.text: Time folds. A dealer from a future timeline offers you cards that haven't been made yet.

choices.label: Future Sight
choices.desc: Add 2 legendary cards to deck

choices.label: Time Loop
choices.desc: Reset deck to start but keep all modifiers

choices.label: Temporal Gambit
choices.desc: Double all modifier values, -30 max HP

unlocks.name: Lucky Penny
unlocks.desc: Win 3 runs total

data.name: Lucky Penny
data.desc: 10% chance to win ties regardless of rank

unlocks.name: Ember Crown

data.name: Ember Crown
data.desc: +1 Ember per trick won on Crown row

unlocks.name: The Forge Spirit
unlocks.desc: Upgrade 10 modifiers in the Forge across all runs

data.title: The Forge Spirit
data.text: The anvil itself speaks. 'You have fed me well. Now I shall forge something... extraordinary.'

choices.label: Forge a Masterwork
choices.desc: Create an Inferno modifier with ×0.5 mult

choices.label: Temper Your Deck
choices.desc: All cards get +3 base chips permanently

choices.label: Anneal Your Soul
choices.desc: +20 max HP, +10 shield at round start

unlocks.name: The Star Gate
unlocks.desc: Win 5 runs total

data.title: The Star Gate
data.text: A portal of crystallized starlight. Through it, you glimpse infinite decks.

choices.label: Step Through
choices.desc: Replace 5 random cards with Star-suit rares

choices.label: Channel the Light
choices.desc: All Star cards permanently get +0.1× mult

choices.label: Absorb the Gate
choices.desc: +25 max HP, Stellar class bonus doubled this run

unlocks.name: Tempest Keyword
unlocks.desc: Win 50 tricks in a single run

data.desc: On win, deal bonus damage equal to consecutive wins × 3

unlocks.name: Leech Keyword
unlocks.desc: Win a run with less than 10 HP remaining

data.desc: On win, heal HP equal to 10% of damage dealt

unlocks.name: Nexus Keyword
unlocks.desc: Activate all 6 archetypes to level 3+ in a single run

data.desc: Counts as all suits for archetype progress

unlocks.name: The Memorial
unlocks.desc: Lose 20 runs total

unlocks.name: The Card Graveyard
unlocks.desc: Burn 100 cards across all runs

data.title: The Card Graveyard
data.text: Ghostly cards swirl in a vortex of lost potential. Some still hold power.

choices.label: Reclaim the Fallen
choices.desc: Add 3 rare cards with Resurrect keyword

choices.label: Harvest the Graveyard
choices.desc: +20 Embers, all Pyre cards get +5 chips

choices.label: Let Them Rest
choices.desc: Heal to full HP, +5 max HP
